description: GSC, GA4, Bing Webmaster and Microsoft Clarity in one MCP server, with built-in SEO analyst tools
name: io.github.Raffaele86/seo-stack-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to a Google service-account JSON key (enables GSC + GA4)
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Path to a Google OAuth desktop client secrets JSON (alternative to service account)
environmentVariables.name: SEO_STACK_OAUTH_CLIENT

environmentVariables.description: Bing Webmaster Tools API key (enables Bing tools)
environmentVariables.name: BING_WEBMASTER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Microsoft Clarity Data Export API token (enables Clarity tools)
environmentVariables.name: CLARITY_API_TOKEN
